name: Feature request

labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the use case or pain point.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new provider, name the agent CLI and link its docs.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you already tried or thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else (mockups, examples, related issues).
